title: In 5 years, nobody will give a damn about AI-detectors
abstract: In five years, nobody will care about AI detectors anymore. It'll be like WiFi – something so ubiquitous that we barely notice it. This tool is here to tell you: the future is now, and don't let technical concerns cloud your enjoyment of life.
abstract_zh: 别再担心AI侦探了，在五年后，估计大家连提都不想提这茬！就当啥事没发生过，咱们继续嗨皮！毕竟那时候，AI已经融入生活无处不在，就像现在你根本不会因为有WiFi而特别兴奋一样。这个工具就是要让你知道：未来已来，别让那些所谓的技术烦恼影响了你的生活质量。
